prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2021–2024 年第 8 名，2025–2026 年第 9 名，稳居全国 Top10，层次极高；2026 年声誉评价偏正面，食堂排名全国第一，新闻传播学科排名前列；抖音热度总排名第 22（较热），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度升温。未见明显投档断档记录；机械工程 A+、光学工程 A+、电气工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、控制科学与工程 A、临床医学 A- 等，工科与医学实力突出，与物理类招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐；河北省 2026 年高考总人数约 60.98 万，较 2025 年（约 60.68 万）略有增加，物理类考生估算约 36.47 万（较 2025 年 36.30 万小幅上升），竞争略加剧；省控线物理类本科批 2024 年 448 分→2025 年 459 分，呈上升趋势；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，非本省高校，在河北省无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年招生计划持平、河北省考生总数小幅增加及省控线上移等因素，在 2025 年基准 3513 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约3563名，区间3135–3991名。

- 电子信息类（未来技术实验班）
- 电气工程及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 3135–3991 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（<3135 名）可重点冲击临床医学八年制、计算机学院等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>3991 名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入华中科技大学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3025→3705→3271→3096→3513, with significant fluctuations over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 3513, which is about 417 places lower than 2024. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 133 in 2021, 123 in 2022, 119 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 116 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 116, unchanged for three consecutive years, with no impact from expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking from 2021 to 2024, and 9th from 2025 to 2026, firmly in the national Top 10, with a very high level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is generally positive, with the cafeteria ranked first nationally and the journalism and communication discipline ranking among the top. The total popularity on Douyin is 22nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating increased attention for applications. No obvious record of admission gaps; Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, etc., with outstanding strength in engineering and medicine, highly matching the enrollment majors for Physics Category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination takers is about 609,800, a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 364,700 (a slight increase from 363,000 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch increased from 448 in 2024 to 459 in 2025, showing an upward trend. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university, so there is no local preference in Hebei Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in the total number of examinees in Hebei Province, and the upward shift of the provincial control line, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 3513. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3563, with a range of 3135–3991.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3135–3991, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<3135), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and the School of Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3991), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to secure admission to Huazhong University of Science and Technology.

The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province for History Category was 19 students in 2021, 19 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 34 in 2025, and 35 in 2026, a slight increase of 1 student (+2.94%) compared to 2025, which is a very small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the main ranking of Soft Science from 2021 to 2024, and 9th from 2025 to 2026, firmly in the national Top 10; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, with the cafeteria ranked first nationally; Douyin heat overall ranking 22nd (relatively hot). No obvious record of admission cutoff gaps; Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A-, and economics-related disciplines are relatively strong, matching the History Category enrollment majors (Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, etc.).
